content.text:
# DCG.CO — Agent Context File

## Project Root
Z:

## Stack
Next.js 15 App Router, Supabase, Stripe, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, TypeScript

## Real Directory Map
- app/ — Next.js routes (App Router)
- components/ — Shared UI components
- components/shop/ — Storefront components
- components/Layouts/ — Layout system
- components/cart/ — Cart components
- lib/ — Shared logic, contexts, utils
- utils/supabase/ — Supabase clients (client.ts, server.ts, middleware.ts)
- hooks/ — Custom React hooks
- types/ — TypeScript types
- style/ — CSS files including layout-tokens.css
- ai/ — Project documentation (ARCHITECTURE.md, CONVENTIONS.md, DECISIONS.md, TASKS.md)

## Key Files
- ai/CONVENTIONS.md — Coding standards to follow
- ai/ARCHITECTURE.md — Full file tree
- ai/DECISIONS.md — Why things were built the way they were
- ai/TASKS.md — Current task list
- components/Layouts/routeClassifier.ts — Route logic
- utils/supabase/client.ts — Browser Supabase client
- utils/supabase/server.ts — Server Supabase client

## Hard Rules
- NEVER touch: webhooks/stripe, auth/, utils/supabase/middleware.ts
- NEVER delete working code — only improve it
- NEVER run git commands
- NEVER change branding, colors, or business logic
- Keep files under 150 lines
- Server components fetch data, client components handle interaction
- Use existing Tailwind + CSS token system — no inline styles

## Updated Files (2026-03-03)
### components/
- New folders: `orders`, `POS`, `documents`, `profile`, `settings`
- New files: `assignRandomJobs.ts`, `CleanTrack.tsx`, `Export.tsx`, `PunchCardGrid.tsx`, `UniversalExportButton.tsx`

### hooks/
- New hooks: `useAnalyticsConsent.ts`, `useCalendarPermissions.ts`, `useChatDebugActions.ts`, `useDocuments.ts`, `useHallMonitor.ts`, `useMessageManagement.ts`, `useOptimisticHours.ts`, `usePersistentTimesheetLogic.ts`, `useRealtimeInsert.ts`, `useRealtimeNotifications.ts`

### lib/
- New folders: `landing`, `monitors`, `usps`
- New files: `escpos.ts`, `thermalPrinter.ts`, `notifications.ts`, `robustPDFGenerator.ts`

## Printer System Tasks (2026-03-03)

- [ ] Verify existence of missing components files: components/CLAUDE.js, components/assignRandomJobs.ts
- [ ] Add Bluetooth connection testing on iOS devices (Web Bluetooth not supported in Safari)
- [ ] Implement error boundary for printer connection failures
- [ ] Add documentation for ESC/POS command set in lib/escpos.ts
- [ ] Create unit tests for thermalPrinter.ts functions
- [ ] Add missing type definitions for Web Serial API in lib/thermalPrinter.ts
- [ ] Implement paper width detection for automatic column width adjustment

## Printer Architecture Decisions (2026-03-03)

1. **ESC/POS Standardization**
   - Adopted ESC/POS command set for thermal printers (lib/escpos.ts)
   - Provides cross-brand compatibility (Epson, Star, Bixolon, HPRT)
   - Includes text formatting, alignment, and paper cutting capabilities

2. **Multi-Channel Connectivity**
   - Implemented both Web Serial (USB) and Web Bluetooth support
   - Handles iOS limitations through print() fallback
   - Separated connection logic into modular functions

3. **Receipt Formatting**
   - Created reusable receipt builder with dynamic width support
   - Included customer information handling
   - Added discount labeling and subtotal tracking

4. **Error Handling**
   - Comprehensive error checking for connection types
   - Fallback mechanisms for Bluetooth MTU limits
   - Clear error messages for unsupported features

arguments.content:
## Printer System Architecture Decisions (2026-03-03)

1. **ESC/POS Standardization**
   - Adopted ESC/POS command set for thermal printers (lib/escpos.ts)
   - Provides cross-brand compatibility (Epson, Star, Bixolon, HPRT)
   - Includes text formatting, alignment, and paper cutting capabilities

2. **Modular Printer Control**
   - Class-based architecture with separate methods for:
     - Text handling
     - Alignment control
     - Style formatting
     - Paper feeding/cutting
   - Clear separation of concerns

3. **Helper Functions**
   - Added fmtMoney() for currency formatting
   - Added fmtDate() for date/time formatting
   - Included row() and divider() for receipt layout

4. **Error Handling**
   - Non-latin characters fall back to '?'
   - Modular design allows for future error tracking

5. **Output Flexibility**
   - Bytes() method returns Uint8Array for direct printing
   - Supports both Web Serial and Web Bluetooth interfaces

## Printer System Tasks (2026-03-03)

- [ ] Add error tracking for ESC/POS command execution
- [ ] Implement unit tests for EscPos class methods
- [ ] Add support for QR code generation via ESC/POS
- [ ] Implement paper width detection for automatic column width adjustment
- [ ] Add documentation for ESC/POS command set in lib/escpos.ts
- [ ] Create TypeScript type definitions for printer status responses
- [ ] Implement fallback mechanisms for unsupported printer features
- [ ] Add Bluetooth connection testing on iOS devices (Web Bluetooth not supported in Safari)
